title: Xentry / Diagnostic Photos
hint: Capture Star Diagnosis screens, freeze frames, and test results. Process when all photos are ready.
captureHint: Use sharp focus on code screens and measurements. Avoid glare on the Xentry display.
analysisPartial: Some photos failed analysis — review extracted data.
waitSaving: Wait for photos to finish saving before processing.
addPhotoFirst: Add at least one diagnostic photo before processing.
roNotLoaded: Repair order not loaded — go back and reopen the line.
pipelineBlockedRo: Finish the repair order scan before processing diagnostic photos.
pipelineBlockedXentry: Finish diagnostic photo processing before scanning a repair order.
statusAnalyzingPhoto: Analyzing photo {{current}} of {{total}} (fault codes, measurements, guided tests)…
